stemHtml: Extensive cloud and precipitation is often associated with a depression because of:

options.a: surface convergence and upper level divergence causing widespread ascent of air in the depression
options.b: surface convergence and upper level divergence causing widespread descent of air in the depression
options.c: surface divergence and upper level convergence causing widespread descent of air in the depression
options.d: surface divergence and upper level convergence causing widespread ascent of air in the depression
